description: Golden query set for the retrieval eval harness. Source paths are root-relative within each sub-app/package, matching how the SPEC_SYNC ingestion stores them (e.g. 'core/knowledge-store/pg-vector-store.ts', not 'packages/core/...'). Code namespace = SPEC_SYNC_NAMESPACE:code; docs namespace = SPEC_SYNC_NAMESPACE:docs. The spec namespace defaults to workspaceId:spec and is typically empty until a spec-sync run.

curated.query: reciprocal rank fusion vector lexical merge scores
curated.notes: RRF implementation — requires vector search; BM25 misses 'merg'+'vector' co-occurrence across chunks

curated.query: KnowledgeStore interface upsert query delete namespace
curated.notes: KnowledgeStore, QueryResult, UpsertChunk interfaces — BM25-friendly (distinctive type names)

curated.query: voyage embedder model dimensions embed texts input type query document
curated.notes: VoyageEmbedder class — BM25-friendly on 'voyage' and 'embedder'

curated.query: chunk markdown heading overlap window text split code docs
curated.notes: chunkText, chunkMarkdown, chunkCode — requires vector for full recall

curated.query: ingest files source path knowledge chunks upsert workspace corpus
curated.notes: ingestFiles and fileToChunks — BM25 may match mcp-tools instead

curated.query: voyage reranker cross encoder apply rerank documents scores
curated.notes: VoyageReranker and applyRerank() — BM25-friendly on 'reranker'

curated.query: PgVectorStore query hybrid vector lexical tsquery embedding cosine
curated.notes: PgVectorStore.query() hybrid retrieval path

curated.query: buildTaskCard buildPrCard buildArtifactCard knowledge store card content
curated.notes: card builders that mirror work products into knowledge store

curated.query: query_knowledge memory action namespace teamId workspaceId corpus mode
curated.notes: handleMemoryAction query_knowledge handler in mcp-tools.ts

curated.query: worker claim task POST route maxConcurrent skill assignment
curated.notes: worker claim endpoint

curated.query: knowledge_chunks table namespace embedding vector source_id content_hash
curated.notes: knowledge_chunks schema definition

curated.query: mission context builder workspace roles active workers prompt injection
curated.notes: mission-context.ts — requires vector search for semantic match

curated.query: release executor branch merge strategy deploy trigger workflow
curated.notes: release executor — 'merge' is common; requires vector for precision

curated.query: role config packaging CLAUDE.md mcp.json env mapping R2 upload
curated.notes: role-config.ts bundles agent config for roles

curated.query: assess knowledge retrieval recall MRR self-retrieval sample chunk
curated.notes: existing assess-knowledge.ts self-retrieval probe

curated.query: missions architecture goal task progress schedule
curated.notes: Missions architecture plan — BM25-friendly (distinctive term 'missions')

curated.query: testing strategy route handler unit smoke integration bun
curated.notes: Testing strategy plan — requires vector; BM25 misses 'bun' as uncommon term in docs

curated.query: claude SDK agent streaming tool use anthropic model ecosystem
curated.notes: Claude SDK ecosystem research — requires vector for multi-concept query

curated.query: source_ts is_current superseded_by recency decay half life corpus authority
curated.notes: Layer 1 recency spec — NOTE: spec namespace is empty in default setup; skipped

curated.query: graph edges expansion 1-hop proximity score spreading activation
curated.notes: Layer 3 graph retrieval spec — NOTE: spec namespace is empty in default setup; skipped

sampled.notes: Self-retrieval: sample workspace team memories, probe with first meaningful line
